mapper.select: SELECT s.MEMBERSHIP_NO AS membershipNo , s.SCHEDULE_NM AS scheduleNm , p.PLAN_NM AS planNm , p.START_TIME AS startTime FROM SCHEDULE s JOIN PLAN p ON s.SCHEDULE_NUM = p.SCHEDULE_NUM WHERE DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE() + INTERVAL 1 DAY, '%Y-%m-%d') BETWEEN s.START_DATE AND s.END_DATE AND p.START_TIME = ( SELECT MIN(p2.START_TIME) FROM PLAN p2 WHERE p2.SCHEDULE_NUM = s.SCHEDULE_NUM AND p2.DEL_YN = 'N' ) AND HOUR(STR_TO_DATE(p.START_TIME, '%H:%i')) = HOUR(NOW()) AND s.DEL_YN = 'N' AND p.DEL_YN = 'N'
